title: Figii
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Figii''''' was a group of two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] carrying [[Grain/Legends|grain]] that were destroyed during the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] assault against the depot of [[Hollan sector/Legends|Hollan D1 sector]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
